business_ideas.idea: Translate 1000+ out-of-copyright books into dozens of languages using AI, create audiobooks for global access
K-through-12 school chain inspired by Ancient Greece emphasizing reasoning, math, writing, beauty, physical fitness
Monumental: Build large-scale inspiring monuments to progress in cities to encourage societal optimism and innovation

predictions.text: What Silicon Valley nerds do for fun now will become mainstream behavior within 10-15 years
AI will largely be business as usual; certain teams like customer success will shrink significantly
Aging/longevity is severely underinvested; regulatory clarity will unlock major pharmaceutical innovation in space
